metadata.name: Omni Template Bot-Bid-Raiser
metadata.description: A curated Omni + AIOStreams + AIOMetadata setup with a minimal formatter and consistent regex icon tags. Includes ready-to-import templates, configs, and an Omni snapshot to restore the full UI in minutes.
metadata.author: Bot-Bid-Raiser

excludedStreamExpressions.expression: /*ongoingSeasonPack*/((queryType=='series' or queryType=='anime.series') and ongoingSeason and (daysSinceLastAired <-1 or daysUntilNextEpisode>=0))?seasonPack(streams,'onlySeasons'):[]

/*Bad 4k Anime*/ (isAnime and originalLanguage != 'English' and count(quality(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'), 'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and count(seadex(resolution(streams, '2160p'))) == 0 and count(regexMatchedInRange(resolution(cached(streams), '2160p'),0,32)) == 0 )? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(streams, '2160p')) : []

/*Bad 4k*/(count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))>=1) and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX')) == 0 and (count(regexMatchedInRange(resolution(streams, '2160p'),0,46)) == 0 or count(bitrate(resolution(streams,'2160p'),percentile(values(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'bitrate'),75)))<=3)? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams), quality(streams, 'Web-DL')),resolution(streams,'2160p')):[]

/*Bad 1080P Bluray*/(queryType=='movie') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0 and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0) and (count(regexMatchedInRange(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'), '2160p'),0,46)) == 0 or count(bitrate(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'),'2160p'),percentile(values(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'),'2160p'),'bitrate'),75))) <=3)?negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray')):[]

/* ⚠️ Low SEL Score*/ count(streamExpressionScore(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), merge(cached(streams), type(streams,'p2p','http'))), isAnime ? 100 : (queryType == 'series' ? 200 : 500))) < 10 ? [] : streamExpressionScore(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), streams), -999999, isAnime ? 100 : (queryType == 'series' ? 1050 : 2250))

negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'))>9? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'), 3))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'))>6? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),6))): count(resolution(negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(cached(streams),type(streams,'p2p','http'))),'2160p','1440p','1080p','720p'))>3? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)),merge(slice(type(uncached(streams),'debrid'), 6), slice(resolution(merge(type(streams,'usenet','http','p2p'),type(cached(streams),'debrid')),'576p','480p','360p','240p','144p','Unknown'),-1))):[])

/*#Radarr*/ /*ATMOS*/ queryType=='movie' ? negate(merge(audioTag(streams, 'AAC', 'DD', 'DD+', 'DTS', 'FLAC', 'TrueHD'), regexMatched(streams, 'Atmos Exclude Groups')), audioTag(streams, 'Atmos')) : []
/*#Radarr*/ /*TrueHD*/ queryType=='movie' ? negate(merge(audioTag(streams, 'Atmos'), regexMatched(streams, 'TrueHD Exclude Groups')), audioTag(streams, 'TrueHD')) : []

definition.name: {stream.filename}, SEL {stream.seScore} {stream.nSeScore::pstar}, {stream.rseMatched}, {stream.message}
